tldr_zh: AI巨頭動向頻繁，Google I/O揭示AI未來，資安事件與國際政策亦受關注。
tldr_en: AI giants make frequent moves, Google I/O unveils AI's future, while cybersecurity and international policies draw attention.

items.title_zh: OpenAI與NVIDIA採用Google SynthID，強化AI內容溯源
items.title_en: OpenAI and NVIDIA Adopt Google's SynthID for AI Content Provenance
items.summary_zh: 為提升AI生成內容的透明度與信任度，OpenAI與NVIDIA宣布將採用Google開發的SynthID浮水印技術。此舉有助於辨識AI生成媒體，並打擊假訊息，是AI生態系邁向更安全的重要一步。
items.summary_en: To enhance transparency and trust in AI-generated content, OpenAI and NVIDIA announced the adoption of Google's SynthID watermarking technology. This move will help identify AI-generated media and combat misinformation, marking a significant step towards a safer AI ecosystem.

items.title_zh: 前OpenAI共同創辦人Andrej Karpathy轉投Anthropic
items.title_en: Former OpenAI Co-founder Andrej Karpathy Joins Anthropic
items.summary_zh: 知名AI研究人員Andrej Karpathy，曾為OpenAI共同創辦人，宣布加入其競爭對手Anthropic。此人才流動被視為AI領域的重大指標，可能影響未來AI技術發展方向。
items.summary_en: Renowned AI researcher Andrej Karpathy, a former co-founder of OpenAI, has announced his move to competitor Anthropic. This talent migration is seen as a significant indicator in the AI field, potentially influencing the future direction of AI technology development.

items.title_zh: Google I/O揭示AI未來：搜尋框將成萬能助理
items.title_en: Google I/O Reveals AI Future: Search Box to Become All-Purpose Assistant
items.summary_zh: 在Google I/O大會上，Google展示了其AI驅動的未來願景，預計搜尋框將進化為能處理所有任務的萬能助理。這項策略旨在透過AI代理和更智慧的互動，徹底改變用戶與數位世界的互動方式。
items.summary_en: At Google I/O, Google unveiled its AI-driven future vision, where the search box is expected to evolve into an all-purpose assistant capable of handling every task. This strategy aims to revolutionize user interaction with the digital world through AI agents and smarter engagement.

items.title_zh: Google與黑石合資成立AI基礎架構公司
items.title_en: Google and Blackstone Form Joint Venture for AI Infrastructure
items.summary_zh: Google與另類資產管理公司黑石宣布合資成立一家AI基礎架構公司，結合雙方的資料中心、網路及TPU資源。此舉旨在提供客戶執行AI所需的運算容量，預計將對新興運算雲業者帶來衝擊。
items.summary_en: Google and alternative asset manager Blackstone announced a joint venture to establish an AI infrastructure company, combining their data center, network, and TPU resources. This initiative aims to provide clients with the computing capacity needed for AI operations, expected to impact emerging cloud computing providers.

items.title_zh: 馬斯克控告OpenAI訴訟案敗訴，法院裁定提告過晚
items.title_en: Elon Musk Loses Lawsuit Against OpenAI, Court Rules Late Filing
items.summary_zh: 伊隆·馬斯克控告OpenAI的訴訟案，陪審團一致裁定他提告過晚，其訴求因超過訴訟時效而被駁回。此判決對馬斯克是一大打擊，也為OpenAI的發展掃清了法律障礙。
items.summary_en: Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI was unanimously rejected by the jury, which ruled that his claims were barred by the statute of limitations due to late filing. This verdict is a significant blow to Musk and clears legal hurdles for OpenAI's continued development.

items.title_zh: GitHub內部儲存庫遭未授權存取，客戶資料暫未受影響
items.title_en: GitHub Internal Repositories Accessed Without Authorization, Customer Data Unaffected
items.summary_zh: GitHub證實其內部儲存庫遭到未經授權的存取，目前正在調查此資安事件。官方表示，尚無證據顯示GitHub內部儲存庫以外的客戶資訊受到影響，但事件凸顯了大型科技平台的資安挑戰。
items.summary_en: GitHub confirmed unauthorized access to its internal repositories and is currently investigating the security incident. The company stated there is no evidence yet that customer information beyond internal repositories has been affected, highlighting the cybersecurity challenges faced by major tech platforms.

items.title_zh: Discord全面啟用語音與視訊通話端對端加密
items.title_en: Discord Fully Enables End-to-End Encryption for Voice and Video Calls
items.summary_zh: 廣受歡迎的通訊平台Discord宣布，已為所有用戶的語音和視訊通話啟用端對端加密。這項更新大幅提升了用戶通訊的隱私與安全性，確保對話內容僅限參與者可見。
items.summary_en: Popular communication platform Discord announced that it has enabled end-to-end encryption for all users' voice and video calls. This update significantly enhances user communication privacy and security, ensuring that conversations are only accessible to participants.

items.title_zh: 美FBI尋求全國車牌辨識系統，欲即時取得數據
items.title_en: US FBI Seeks Nationwide License Plate Camera Access for Real-Time Data
items.summary_zh: 美國聯邦調查局（FBI）正尋求全國範圍內車牌辨識攝影機的存取權限，目標是從供應商處獲得近乎即時的車輛追蹤與搜尋數據。此舉引發了對公民隱私權的擔憂，可能影響科技政策與法規。
items.summary_en: The U.S. Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) is seeking nationwide access to license plate cameras, aiming to obtain near real-time vehicle tracking and search data from vendors. This move raises concerns about civil privacy rights and could impact technology policies and regulations.

items.title_zh: 美參院通過決議，限制川普對伊朗開戰權力
items.title_en: US Senate Passes Resolution Limiting Trump's War Powers on Iran
items.summary_zh: 美國聯邦參議院以跨黨派投票結果，通過一項「戰爭權力決議案」，要求總統川普在未獲國會授權下，必須結束美伊戰爭。此為國會對總統權力罕見的嚴厲制衡，凸顯兩黨對外交政策的擔憂。
items.summary_en: The U.S. Senate passed a War Powers Resolution with bipartisan support, requiring President Trump to end the U.S.-Iran conflict unless authorized by Congress. This represents a rare and strong check on presidential power by Congress, highlighting bipartisan concerns over foreign policy.

items.title_zh: 川普施壓奏效，歐盟同意執行與美貿易協議
items.title_en: Trump's Pressure Works, EU Agrees to Implement Trade Deal with US
items.summary_zh: 在美國總統川普的壓力下，歐洲議會與歐盟會員國達成共識，將執行近一年前與美國達成的貿易協議。川普曾警告，若歐盟未在7月4日前完成程序，將面臨新的關稅，此舉避免了潛在的貿易戰。
items.summary_en: Under pressure from U.S. President Trump, the European Parliament and EU member states have agreed to implement a trade deal reached with the U.S. nearly a year ago. Trump had warned that the EU would face new tariffs if it failed to complete the process by July 4, a move that averted a potential trade war.

items.title_zh: 韓國三星電子勞資協商破局，工會宣布全面罷工
items.title_en: South Korea's Samsung Electronics Labor Talks Fail, Union Announces Full Strike
items.summary_zh: 韓國三星電子勞資雙方經過多日協商後確定破局，工會宣布將於明天（21日）展開全面罷工。這是三星電子史上首次全面罷工，可能對全球電子產業供應鏈造成影響。
items.summary_en: Labor negotiations at South Korea's Samsung Electronics have definitively failed after several days of talks, with the union announcing a full strike starting tomorrow (May 21). This marks the first full strike in Samsung Electronics' history and could impact the global electronics supply chain.
